label: Ashvault Sleep Alcove
description: Ashvault Sleep Alcove is a narrow, pressure-rated recess partitioned from the hab-cell by a sliding composite screen and gasketed seam. A wall-bolted bunk frame and restraint webbing define the space, with a fold-down shelf for personal effects set beneath a recessed lumen strip tuned to regulated night-cycle dimness. Surfaces are finished in scrubbed ferrocrete and void-black bracing, interrupted only by a vent grille and a sealed conduit run serving the habitation’s filtration and alarm circuits. The air remains dry and metallic from recycled flow, and sound carries as a muted thrum through the superstructure’s braced walls.
